# Skill Registry

**Generated by**: sdd-init
**Date**: 2026-03-31
**Project**: opencode

## SDD Workflow Skills

| Skill | Description | Trigger |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| sdd-init | Bootstrap SDD context and project configuration | "sdd init", "iniciar sdd", "openspec init" |
| sdd-explore | Investigate codebase and think through ideas | "sdd-explore <topic>" |
| sdd-propose | Create change proposals from explorations | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-spec | Write detailed specifications from proposals | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-design | Create technical design from proposals | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-tasks | Break down specs and designs into implementation tasks | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-apply | Implement tasks from the change | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-verify | Validate implementation against specs | sdd-orchestrator delegates |
| sdd-archive | Sync delta specs to main specs and archive completed change | sdd-orchestrator delegates |

## Project Conventions

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| AGENTS.md | Primary agent instructions |
| ORCHESTRATOR.md | SDD orchestrator role and model fallback table |
| opencode.json | Agent configuration and model chains |

## Notes

- SDD skills (sdd-*) are internal workflow skills, not user-facing
- Skills with MCP integration (jira, perplexity, etc.) require MCP configuration
- Many marketing skills (guimkt-*) are specialized for marketing workflows
- This registry is automatically generated by sdd-init
